attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT CG1_FND_FLEX_VALUES.FLEX_VALUE_SET_ID,
CG1_FND_FLEX_VALUES.FLEX_VALUE_ID,
REPLACE(replace(FLEX_VALUE,chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32)) FLEX_VALUE,
CG1_FND_FLEX_VALUES.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
CG1_FND_FLEX_VALUES.LAST_UPDATED_BY,
CG1_FND_FLEX_VALUES.CREATION_DATE,
CG1_FND_FLEX_VALUES.CREATED_BY,
REPLACE(replace(ENABLED_FLAG,chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32)) ENABLED_FLAG,
REPLACE(replace(SUMMARY_FLAG,chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32)) SUMMARY_FLAG,
